task: Write API documentation for a REST endpoint: POST /api/v1/invoices — creates an invoice with line items.
expect: Includes complete request and response body examples in JSON
Documents error codes with descriptions and resolution hints
Specifies authentication requirements (API key, OAuth, etc.)
Provides field-level descriptions with types, constraints, and defaults
Contains a working curl example ready to copy-paste

task: Create a getting-started guide for a developer SDK. The SDK has auth, CRUD operations, and webhooks.
expect: Opens with a 5-line quickstart that gets the developer to a working call
Builds progressive complexity from auth to CRUD to webhooks
Includes working code samples for each major feature
Lists prerequisites (language version, dependencies, API keys)
Has a troubleshooting section covering common setup failures

task: Our API docs are outdated — 30% of endpoints have changed since docs were last updated. Create an audit and update plan.
expect: Defines a gap analysis methodology to identify stale documentation
Prioritises updates by endpoint usage or business criticality
Proposes an update workflow with review and verification steps
Includes a verification process to confirm docs match live API behavior
